'''竏喩-ng-th''' ('''kagangath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pulsotype|pulsotype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pulsotype|pulsotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-ng-th
|-
! Lemma
| kagangath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigangath|thigangath]] || [[word:jigangath|jigangath]] || [[word:shigangath|shigangath]] || [[word:kigangath|kigangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugangath|thuthugangath]] || [[word:jujugangath|jujugangath]] || [[word:shushugangath|shushugangath]] || [[word:kukugangath|kukugangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugangath|thugangath]] || [[word:jugangath|jugangath]] || [[word:shugangath|shugangath]] || [[word:kugangath|kugangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugangath|thugangath]] || [[word:jugangath|jugangath]] || [[word:shugangath|shugangath]] || [[word:kugangath|kugangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegangath|thegangath]] || [[word:jegangath|jegangath]] || [[word:shegangath|shegangath]] || [[word:kegangath|kegangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogangath|thothogangath]] || [[word:jojogangath|jojogangath]] || [[word:shoshogangath|shoshogangath]] || [[word:kokogangath|kokogangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogangath|thogangath]] || [[word:jogangath|jogangath]] || [[word:shogangath|shogangath]] || [[word:kogangath|kogangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogangath|thogangath]] || [[word:jogangath|jogangath]] || [[word:shogangath|shogangath]] || [[word:kogangath|kogangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦgangath|thﾃｦgangath]] || [[word:jﾃｦgangath|jﾃｦgangath]] || [[word:shﾃｦgangath|shﾃｦgangath]] || [[word:kﾃｦgangath|kﾃｦgangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagangath|thathagangath]] || [[word:jajagangath|jajagangath]] || [[word:shashagangath|shashagangath]] || [[word:kakagangath|kakagangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagangath|thagangath]] || [[word:jagangath|jagangath]] || [[word:shagangath|shagangath]] || [[word:kagangath|kagangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagangath|thagangath]] || [[word:jagangath|jagangath]] || [[word:shagangath|shagangath]] || [[word:kagangath|kagangath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagangath|shagangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagangath|goshagangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagangath|gokishagangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagangathnﾃｼ|shagangathnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagangathnknﾃｼ|goshagangathnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangathnﾃｼ|gokishagangathnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagangathshﾃｫ|shagangathshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagangathnkshﾃｫ|goshagangathnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagangathshﾃｫ|gokishagangathshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangathro|shagangathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangathnkro|goshagangathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangathro|gokishagangathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangathmu|shagangathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangathnkmu|goshagangathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangathmu|gokishagangathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagangathsher|shagangathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagangathnksher|goshagangathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagangathsher|gokishagangathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagangathng|shagangathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagangathnkng|goshagangathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagangathng|gokishagangathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagangathya|shagangathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagangathnkya|goshagangathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagangathya|gokishagangathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagangathyam|shagangathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagangathnkyam|goshagangathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagangathyam|gokishagangathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shagangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagangathnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshagangathnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishagangathnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangathnﾃｼro|shagangathnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangathnknﾃｼro|goshagangathnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangathnﾃｼro|gokishagangathnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangathnﾃｼmu|shagangathnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangathnknﾃｼmu|goshagangathnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangathnﾃｼmu|gokishagangathnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shagangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagangathnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshagangathnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishagangathshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangathshﾃｫro|shagangathshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangathnkshﾃｫro|goshagangathnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangathshﾃｫro|gokishagangathshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangathshﾃｫmu|shagangathshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangathnkshﾃｫmu|goshagangathnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangathshﾃｫmu|gokishagangathshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagangathronﾃｼ|shagangathronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagangathnkronﾃｼ|goshagangathnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangathronﾃｼ|gokishagangathronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagangathroshﾃｫ|shagangathroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagangathnkroshﾃｫ|goshagangathnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagangathroshﾃｫ|gokishagangathroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagangathromu|shagangathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagangathnkromu|goshagangathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagangathromu|gokishagangathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagangathmunﾃｼ|shagangathmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagangathnkmunﾃｼ|goshagangathnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagangathmunﾃｼ|gokishagangathmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagangathmushﾃｫ|shagangathmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagangathnkmushﾃｫ|goshagangathnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagangathmushﾃｫ|gokishagangathmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagangathmuro|shagangathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagangathnkmuro|goshagangathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagangathmuro|gokishagangathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
